items.title: At SIGGRAPH, NVIDIA Advances Graphics and Simulation With Agentic and Physical AI
items.content_text: From open models to real-time simulation, AI and graphics breakthroughs are transforming media, content creation and robotics.

items.title: Bristol Myers Squibb Building Life Science Industry’s Most Advanced AI Factory on NVIDIA Vera Rubin
items.content_text: The pharmaceutical company has demonstrated how AI can transform how drugs discovery and is now scaling AI across R&D to accelerate the discovery of next-generation medicines.

items.title: NVIDIA Vera Rubin Maximizes Intelligence per Dollar for Post-Training Workloads — a Key Metric for Agentic AI
items.content_text: Lowest cost per token from extreme codesign maximizes intelligence per dollar for post-training in the agentic era.

items.title: NVIDIA Introduces New Jetson Thor Computers to Advance Mainstream Robotics and Edge AI
items.content_text: New NVIDIA Blackwell-powered T3000 and T2000 modules, paired with new NVIDIA Jetson software memory optimization and agent skills, help partners and customers move advanced robotics, visual AI and edge workloads onto compact, power-efficient systems.

items.title: NVIDIA Agent Toolkit Expands With New Omniverse Libraries, Putting AI Agents to Work Building Simulation-Ready Worlds
items.content_text: NVIDIA today announced that NVIDIA Agent Toolkit now includes NVIDIA Omniverse™ libraries — a collection of software components that give AI agents tools and skills to add physical AI capabilities to existing applications and prepare 3D content for simulation.

items.title: Japan Government, Industrial Leaders and NVIDIA Launch the World’s First National AI Infrastructure
items.content_text: NVIDIA today announced it is working with Noetra Corp. to launch an NVIDIA Vera Rubin AI factory with 13,750 NVIDIA Vera CPUs and 27,500 NVIDIA Rubin GPUs for national physical AI.

items.title: Japan’s Robotics and Manufacturing Leaders Build on NVIDIA Cosmos to Advance Physical AI Frontier
items.content_text: NVIDIA today announced that Japan’s physical AI leaders are building on the NVIDIA Cosmos™, NVIDIA Isaac™, NVIDIA Metropolis and NVIDIA Jetson™ platforms to accelerate the deployment of intelligent machines across manufacturing, mobility, infrastructure and robotics.

items.title: Japan’s Enterprises and Startups Build Industry-Specialized AI With NVIDIA Nemotron Open Models
items.content_text: NVIDIA today announced that leading Japanese enterprises, startups and research institutions are building industry-specialized AI models and applications with NVIDIA Nemotron™ open models, data and libraries, accelerating the development of AI tailored to Japan’s language, industries and workforce.
